name: Marinated Chicken Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Green/Sweet Red Pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 Tablespoons Olive Oil or Cooking Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade by combining lemon juice, water, olive oil, tarragon, hot pepper sauce, salt, and garlic in a plastic bag.
2. Place the boned, skinless Chicken Breast Halves (12 ounces) into the bag and seal it.
3. Let the chicken stand at room temperature for 20 minutes, turning the bag frequently to ensure even coating.
4. Cut the green or sweet red pepper into 1-inch squares.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and drain well.
6. Thread the chicken, zucchini, and red pepper alternately onto four long skewers.
7. Arrange the skewers on an unheated rack in a broiler pan, about 4-5 inches from the heat.
8. Broil for 8 minutes or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink. Turn the skewers once and brush with remaining marinade.
Per serving: 173 calories, 27 g protein, 4 g carbohydrates, 5 g fat, 72 mg cholesterol, 83 mg sodium, 441 mg potassium.
